name: Cloud Storage Exfiltration Detection
description: Detects bulk download or exfiltration from cloud storage (S3, GCS, Azure Blob). Riggs AI analyzes the data access pattern using the data_exfil template to determine if the activity represents genuine exfiltration. Confirmed exfiltration triggers immediate access restriction, investigation of accessed objects, incident ticket creation with forensic details, and team notification. Legitimate access receives a severity adjustment and note.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: AWS Security Hub
required_integrations.reason: Source of storage access anomaly findings and S3 bucket policy management

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create forensic investigation tickets for confirmed data exfiltration events

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify the security team of data exfiltration detection and response actions

config.description: Triggers when anomalous bulk download or data access pattern is detected on cloud storage resources

config.additional_instructions: Evaluate cloud storage access pattern: volume of data accessed, access timing, source IP reputation, data classification of accessed objects
config.description: AI-powered data exfiltration analysis to determine if the bulk cloud storage access represents genuine data theft
Routes based on whether the AI assessment confirmed data exfiltration from cloud storage
Immediately restrict the suspect principal's access to the affected cloud storage bucket

config.query: S3 access logs for bucket={{trigger_1.alert.bucket_name}} by principal={{trigger_1.alert.principal_id}} in the last 48 hours: object keys, data volume, source IPs, request types
config.description: Query storage access logs to determine the full scope of objects accessed, total data volume, and access timeline

parameters.summary: Cloud Storage Exfiltration: {{trigger_1.alert.bucket_name}} — Forensic Review Required

config.description: Create a forensic investigation ticket with full details of the exfiltration scope
Notify the security team of the data exfiltration event and containment actions

parameters.note: Reviewed by Riggs AI (data_exfil template). Bulk storage access determined to be legitimate. Confidence: {{analyze_1.confidence}}. Assessment: {{analyze_1.summary}}

config.description: Document that AI analysis determined the bulk access was legitimate and not exfiltration
Cloud storage exfiltration detection and response complete
